context: You are checking into a hotel in Moscow. The receptionist greets you at the front desk.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Добрый день! Добро пожаловать в наш отель.
exchanges.translation: Good day! Welcome to our hotel.

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say hello and that you have a reservation

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Ask how much the room costs per night

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Одноместный номер стоит пять тысяч рублей за ночь. Завтрак включён.
exchanges.translation: A single room costs five thousand rubles per night. Breakfast is included.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Да, бесплатный Wi-Fi по всему отелю. Вот ваш ключ. Номер триста пять.
exchanges.translation: Yes, free Wi-Fi throughout the hotel. Here is your key. Room three hundred five.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Выселение до двенадцати часов дня. Желаю вам приятного пребывания!
exchanges.translation: Check-out is by twelve noon. I wish you a pleasant stay!
